description: Part one of a twelve part series from Deep Dish TV on the war in Iraq. The programs address the implications and consequences of the recent military actions in Iraq and shows how people are mobilizing to deal with the issues raised by the war. To see other parts in this series, click: Part 1: The Real Face of Occupation Part 2: Standing with the Women of Iraq Part 3: National Insecurities Part 4: The Art of Resistance Part 5: Dance of Death Part 6: Erasing Memory - The Cultural Destruction of Iraq Part 7: Globalizaton at Gunpoint - The Economics of Occupation Part 8: The World Says NO to War Part 9: Empire and Oil Part 10: Channels of War: The Media is the Military Part 11: Resistance at Home Part 12: Baghdad
subject: iraq
war
shock and awe

title: Shocking and Awful - The Real Face of Occupation
